use_cases: Display loading state while fetching data
Show processing activity during async operations
Provide visual feedback during form submissions
Use as a wait indicator in dashboards or interfaces
ai_summary: A vibrant grid-based loader component featuring a 3x3 cell layout with cascading ripple animation. Each cell sequentially illuminates from green to cyan with staggered delays, creating a wave-like visual effect. The minimal flat design uses CSS-only animations, making it lightweight and suitable for any loading scenario across web platforms.
